item.title: Third Season of 'Isekai Maou to Shoukan Shoujo no Dorei Majutsu' Announced
item.description: The official website for the television anime adaptation of Yukiya Murasaki and Takahiro Tsurusaki's Isekai Maou to Shoukan Shoujo no Dorei Majutsu (How NOT to Summon a Demon Lord) light novel announced a third season, subtitled ULT, on Monday. Tsurusaki drew an illustration to commemorate the announcement (pictured). Produced by Ajia-do, the first season aired in 12 episodes in Summer 2018, followed by a 10-episode seocnd season in Spring 2021. Crunchyroll streamed the anime with English d...

item.title: Supporting Cast for 'Sekai Saikyou no Kouei: Meikyuukoku no Shinjin Tansakusha' Announced
item.description: The official website for the television anime adaptation of Touwa Akatsuki's Sekai Saikyou no Kouei: Meikyuukoku no Shinjin Tansakusha (The World's Strongest Rearguard: Labyrinth Country's Novice Seeker) light novel announced supporting cast on Monday. The anime series will begin airing on Tokyo MX, BS11, and Sun TV in July 2026. Cast Misaki: Kaede Hondo (Isekai Mokushiroku Mynoghra) Madoka: Kanon Takao (Zenshuu.) Melissa: Yuuka Aisaka (Isekai Nonbiri Nouka) Yuuji Yanase (Isekai M...

item.title: Hayate Moves Into Production with Lay-duce Acquisition
item.description: Hayate, a joint venture established by Aniplex and Crunchyroll, has acquired all outstanding shares of animation studio Lay-duce, making it a wholly owned subsidiary. The transaction marks Hayate's first equity investment in an animation production studio and signals a strategic shift toward vertically integrated production capabilities. Founded to develop anime content for global audiences—primarily distributed via Crunchyroll's international streaming platform—Hayate has...

item.title: 'Doko yori mo Tooi Basho ni Iru Kimi e' Announces Main Cast, Additional Staff, Second Teaser Trailer
item.description: The official website of the Doko yori mo Tooi Basho ni Iru Kimi e (To You in the Beyond) movie revealed the main cast, additional staff, a teaser visual (pictured right), and a second teaser trailer on Sunday. The anime movie adapting Akiko Abe's mystery romance novel will premiere in theaters in Japan on October 9. Cast Kazuki Tsukigase: Hiiro Ishibashi (Kaoru Hana wa Rin to Saku) Nanao Aika: Anna Nagase (Summertime Render) Mikiya Ozaki: Simba Tsuchiya (Ballroom e Youkoso) Takatsu: Hirosh...

item.title: 'Akane-banashi' Announces Additional Cast Pair
item.description: The official X (formally Twitter) of the Akane-banashi television anime revealed an additional pair of cast on Saturday. The anime series adapting Yuuki Suenaga and Takamasa Moue's drama performance arts manga will begin airing on TV Asahi's IMAnimation programming block, followed by BS Asahi and AT-X at 11.30 p.m. on April 4. Voice actors Fumihiko Tachiki (Bleach: Sennen Kessen-hen) and Hiroaki Hirata (Sanda) are joining the cast as Zensho Arakawa and Ikken Arakawa, respectively. Ayu...

item.title: Additional Cast for 'Yani Neko' Announced
item.description: The official website for the television anime adaptation of Nyannyan Factory's Yani Neko (Chainsmoker Cat) manga revealed additional cast and a key visual (pictured) on Friday. The anime is scheduled to premiere on Tokyo MX and BS11 at 12:30 a.m. every Thursday, starting on July 3. Cast Masuko Etsushimaru: Misato Matsuoka (Tamon-kun Ima Docchi!?) Kaoruko Nishi: Ayaka Shimizu (Rock wa Lady no Tashinami deshite) Ouya Ootani: Tetsu Inada (Silent Witch) Aruko Sakai: Shiori Izawa (Chainsaw Man)...

item.title: Manga 'Honey Lemon Soda' Concludes Ten-Year Serialization
item.description: Mayu Murata's Honey Lemon Soda will conclude in the May 2026 issue of Ribon Magazine on April 3. The 124th chapter will mark the end of its 10-year serialization. Murata began serializing the school romance manga in Ribon Magazine in December 2015. Shueisha shipped the 30th volume in December 2025 and will release the 31st and final volume on May 25. Honey Lemon Soda has a cumulative circulation of over 16 million copies. Produced by J.C.Staff, the first season aired in Winter 2025 and con...

item.title: 'The Fable' Gets Second Season
item.description: Production company VAP announced a second season for the The Fable television anime on Thursday, revealing the returning cast, staff, and a teaser visual (pictured). The new season will adapt the Yamaoka-hen (Yamaoka Arc) from Katsuhisa Minami's crime comedy manga. Voice actors Kazuyuki Okitsu, Miyuki Sawashiro, Kana Hanazawa, Akio Ootsuka, and Tetsuo Komura are reprising their roles from the first season. Ryousuke Takahashi (Soukou Kihei Votoms) is returning to direct the second season at...

item.title: 'Love Live! Hasunosora Jogakuin School Idol Club' Gets TV Anime in January 2027
item.description: The official X (formerly Twitter) account for the Hasunosora Jogakuin School Idol Club (Hasunosora Girls' High School Idol Club) project announced a television anime on Tuesday, scheduled to premiere in January 2027. The Love Live! Hasunosora Jogakuin School Idol Club Movie: Bloom Garden Party 3DCG movie will open in Japanese theaters on May 8. ODD No. Inc. launched the project through the Link! Like! Love Live! smartphone app in April 2023. The unit released its first single Dream Believe...

item.title: North American Anime & Manga Releases for April
item.description: Here are the North American anime, manga, and light novel releases for April. Week 1: April 7 - 13 Anime Releases Captain Tsubasa (2018) DVD Captain Tsubasa Season 2: Junior Youth-hen (Captain Tsubasa: Junior Youth Arc) DVD Isekai Nonbiri Nouka (Farming Life in Another World) Blu-ray [Limited Edition, SteelBook] One Piece Season 14 Voyage 9 (incl. episodes 989-1000) Blu-ray + DVD Manga Releases Ao no Exorcist (Blue Exorcist) Vol.32 Blue Lock: Episode Nagi Vol.7 Bokura no Suki wa Warikirenai (Lov...

item.title: 'Saikyou Degarashi Ouji no Anyaku Teii Arasoi' Reveals Main Cast, Staff, Summer 2026 Premiere
item.description: Production company Kadokawa opened an official website for a television anime adaptation of Tanba's Saikyou Degarashi Ouji no Anyaku Teii Arasoi: Munou wo Enjiru SS Rank Ouji wa Koui Keishousen wo Kage kara Shihai suru (The Insipid Prince's Furtive Grab for the Throne) light novel on Tuesday, revealing the main cast, staff, and a teaser visual (pictured). The anime series is scheduled to premiere in July 2026. Cast Arnold Lakes Adler: Yuuma Uchida (Jujutsu Kaisen) Leonard Lakes Adler:...

item.title: 'Golden Kamuy: Bousou Ressha-hen' Announced for Next Winter
item.description: The 13th and final episode of Golden Kamuy: Saishuushou (Golden Kamuy Final Season) announced an anime sequel adapting the Bousou Ressha-hen (Runaway Train arc) on Monday. The official website also revealed a teaser visual (pictured). The sequel is scheduled to be released next Winter. Golden Kamuy adapts Satoru Noda's historical adventure manga, which serialized in Young Jump magazine from August 2014 to April 2022. Shueisha shipped the 31st and final volume in July 2022. The manga has a c...

item.title: 'Nippon Sangoku' Unveils Additional Cast, Ending Theme, Third Promo
item.description: The official website for the television anime adaptation of Ikka Matsuki's Nippon Sangoku manga unveiled additional cast, a special visual (pictured), the ending theme, and third promotional video on Monday. The anime series is scheduled to premiere on April 7 at 12:00 a.m. on Tokyo MX and BS Nippon TV, followed by TV Aichi, Yomiuri TV, and other stations. Cast Yayakichi Hei: Kenyuu Horiuchi (Dorohedoro) Nagao Muuton: Shuuichirou Umeda (Hikaru ga Shinda Natsu) Akii Kura: Shunsuke Sakuya (Za...

item.title: 'Gintama' Creator Hideaki Sorachi Begins New Manga in April 2026
item.description: The 18th issue of Weekly Shounen Jump magazine announced that a new manga by Hideaki Sorachi, 2-nen B-gumi Yuusha Destroyers (Hero Destroyers of Class 2B), will begin in the 21st issue on April 20. This marks Sorachi's first serialization in seven years after the end of Gintama in 2019. Sorachi serialized Gintama in Weekly Shounen Jump from December 2003 to September 2018. The manga then transferred to Jump Giga and ran for three consecutive issues from December 2018 to February 2019. The l...

item.title: '"Kimi wo Aisuru Ki wa Nai" to Itta Jiki Koushaku-sama ga Nazeka Dekiai shitekimasu' Reveals Additional Cast Pair
item.description: The "Kimi wo Aisuru Ki wa Nai" to Itta Jiki Koushaku-sama ga Nazeka Dekiai shitekimasu (The Duke's Son Claims He Won't Love Me yet Showers Me with Adoration) AnimeJapan 2026 special stage at the DMM TV booth revealed an additional cast pair on Sunday. The anime adapting Kei Misawa and Natsu Mizuno's fantasy romance manga will premiere on TV Asahi and BS Asahi in July 2026. Voice actors Kaito Ishikawa (Watashi no Shiawase na Kekkon) and Chika Anzai (Jibaku Shounen Hanako-...

item.title: 'Iwamoto-senpai no Suisen' Unveils Additional Cast, Second Promo for Summer 2026
item.description: The Iwamoto-senpai no Suisen (Recommendation from Mr. Iwamoto) AnimeJapan 2026 stage event at the Hakuhodo DY Music & Pictures booth unveiled additional cast, a second promo, and new visual (pictured above) on Sunday. The anime series adapting Hiroshi Shiibashi's seinen military manga will premiere in July 2026. Cast Kitsujou-sensei: Akira Ishida (Ranma ½ (2024) 2nd Season) Okuaki Oni: Masaya Fukunishi (Teogonia) Aonuma Shizuma: Takuma Nagatsuka (Akuyaku Reijou Tensei Ojisan) To...

item.title: 'Tokyo Revengers: Santen Sensou-hen' Reveals Additional Cast, Second Promo for Fall 2026
item.description: The Pony Canyon booth at AnimeJapan 2026 revealed four additional cast and a second promotional video for Tokyo Revengers: Santen Sensou-hen (Tokyo Revengers: Three Deities arc) television anime on Sunday. The anime is scheduled to premiere in October 2026. Cast Takeomi Akashi: Naoyuki Shimozuru (Binan Koukou Chikyuu Bouei-bu Happy Kiss!) Keizo Arashi: Takanori Hoshino (Mob Psycho 100 II) Wakasa Imaushi: Shinnosuke Tachibana (Tokyo Ghoul) Minami Terano: Hiroki Yasumoto (One Punch Man) Maki Kodai...

item.title: 'Tougen Anki: Nikko Kegon no Taki-hen' Announces Additional Cast Pair for Fall 2026
item.description: The Tougen Anki: Nikko Kegon no Taki-hen (Tougen Anki: Nikko Kegon Falls Arc) AnimeJapan 2026 stage event at the Pony Canyon booth announced an additional cast pair on Sunday. The second season adapting Yura Urushibara's action fantasy manga will air on Nippon Television beginning in October 2026. Voice actors Nobuhiko Okamoto (Kimetsu no Yaiba) and Kent Itou ([Oshi no Ko]) are joining the cast as Hagure Nekosaki and Yuu Innami, respectively. Ato Nonaka (Fate/Zero episode director) is retur...

item.title: 'Nijusseiki Denki Mokuroku' Reveals Additional Cast, Staff, Theme Songs, Second Promo
item.description: The Nijusseiki Denki Mokuroku (Sparks of Tomorrow) Blue Stage revealed additional cast, staff, theme songs, second key visual (pictured), and a second promotional video on Sunday. The anime, adapting Hiro Yuuki's historical romance light novel, is scheduled to premiere on July 5 at 11:00 p.m. on Tokyo MX, followed by BS11, ABC TV, and TV Aichi. Cast Suzu Harashima: You Taichi (Majo to Yajuu) Kate Ookura: Natsumi Kawaida (Hige wo Soru. Soshite Joshikousei wo Hirou.) Yajirou Yagura: Kazuki Ur...

item.title: 'Gensou Suikoden' Announces Supporting Cast
item.description: The Gensou Suikoden (Suikoden: The Anime) White Stage at AnimeJapan 2026 revealed supporting cast members and a fourth key visual (pictured) on Sunday. The anime series adapting Konami's fantasy role-playing game will begin airing in October 2026. Cast Culgan: Jun Kasama (Revenger) Seed: Yoshitsugu Matsuoka (Re:Zero kara Hajimeru Isekai Seikatsu) Leknaat: Megumi Han (Tate no Yuusha no Nariagari) Gengen: Shouta Hayama (Tokyo Revengers) Rikimaru: Ryuunosuke Watanuki (Blue Lock) Rina: Saya Hit...
